body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but now has a translucent, faintly glowing violet skin with swirling crimson mist visible beneath the surface, while the pointed ears become wispy and semi-transparent like smoke. The compact plump body shifts from white to a deep violet hue with faint silver outlines, its padded joints now appearing as subtle energy ripples that distort the air around them. The paw-like hands transform into semi-solid, shadowy appendages with a ghostly silver glow, their padded joints replaced by faint, shimmering energy currents. The curled tail tip dissolves into a wispy trail of shadowy vapor, blending seamlessly with the dissolving edges of the body that fade into thin air.
signature_feature: Tattered tail: wispy shadow vapor trailing like smoke, dissolving into mist at the tip.
